summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of iteration 3 — the modern NBFC marketing redesign (GoodSkill / Tycoon / Skyrise inspired). All 15 routes load with 200 OK and zero console errors. Modern NBFC visual identity is fully implemented end-to-end: dark blue (#0f2855) top contact strip with Customer Care 879624245 (orange highlight) + Grievance/Disclosures links on right, white sticky brand row with blue 'L' logo + Poppins brand name + 5-link NavLink primary nav + orange 'Apply Now' button. Fonts verified: body = Open Sans, h1 = Poppins. Active nav state = orange rgb(245, 130, 32). Home hero: deep blue gradient bg, white headline 'Short Term Instant Loans & Flexible Credit Lines', 4 orange-check bullets, Apply Now (orange) + Learn More (white outline) buttons, hero photo with overlay badges '100% DIGITAL' and '24 Hrs QUICK DISBURSAL' — all confirmed. Stats row: 1500+ / ₹40Cr+ / 10+ Cities Covered / 99% Satisfaction. Steps grid (Apply Online / Verify Documents / Sign Digitally / Get Disbursal), Products grid (Pay Day / Business / Loan Against Property / EMI Loan), Why Choose Logix 6-card grid (Swift Approvals / Transparent Pricing / RBI Compliant / Minimal Paperwork / High Acceptance / Customer First) all present. Dark CTA band 'Get Started Today' renders with linear-gradient(135deg, #0f2855 → #133e8a); white-outline 'Speak with Expert' button has white text + white border on the dark gradient and is clearly readable — the .btn-outline-white CSS specificity fix works correctly. Mobile menu (viewport <1024px) toggles open/close, contains 5 nav links + mobile Apply Now button, and SPA navigation works. Policy pages render with blue hero band + HOME/POLICIES breadcrumb + left sidebar (all 10 policies listed) with the active item highlighted in cream rgb(255,244,232) + orange text rgb(245,130,32). Real verbatim policy content from POLICIES.docx is intact on the 4 covered pages: Interest Rate (Master Direction 2025, 0.10, 1.00, 1.25%, 3 days free look, NACH, prepayment-strictly-not-permitted), Privacy (age of 13, info@logixfinance, cookies), FPC, Grievance Redressal (48 hours, 7 working days, 15 working days, 879624245). Contact form submit is disabled before consent and enabled after. ScrollToTop works on navigation. .ph placeholders render with subtle cream bg rgb(255,247,233) — matches spec.

issues: Wording variation from POLICIES.docx: rendered text reads 'Part Prepayment' (one word, capitalised) and 'Rs. 500' (with space). Iteration 2 had verbatim 'Part pre-payment' (hyphenated) and 'Rs.500' (no space). Semantically identical and policy content is intact, but main agent should confirm wording matches the source document if exact verbatim is required.

Email rendered literally as 'info@logixfinance&investment.com' (contains the '&' character in the local-part). This is the value supplied by the user but is not a valid SMTP address — flag for confirmation.

action_items: (Verify) Confirm with source POLICIES.docx whether 'Part Prepayment' / 'Rs. 500' wording is acceptable, or restore 'Part pre-payment' / 'Rs.500' from iteration 2.
(Verify) Confirm the literal '&' in the support email is intentional (the value the user supplied) — otherwise consider 'info@logixfinanceandinvestment.com'.
critical_code_review_comments: index.css design system is clean: .btn / .btn-primary / .btn-outline / .btn-outline-white / .btn-accent with !important on color keeps text legible across light and dark backgrounds. The dark-CTA white-outline fix works (verified parent gradient + white text + white border on Speak with Expert).
Header.jsx now uses react-router <Link> for both top-strip 'Grievance Redressal' and 'Disclosures' (the iteration-2 anchor regression is fixed) — SPA navigation works without full reload.

Footer.jsx uses <X /> placeholders consistently for CIN/RBI/GSTIN/address/copyright year — placeholders render with the subtle cream class (.ph), matches the modern-NBFC aesthetic of the rest of the site.

Every route still shares the same default document.title 'Logix Finance & Investment …'. This was flagged in iterations 1 & 2 and is still unaddressed. Per-route titles (react-helmet-async or a useEffect) would improve SEO + accessibility for the 15 routes.
Hero/about-section images are loaded from external URLs (unsplash etc.). For a regulated NBFC submission, consider hosting images locally to avoid external availability/CSP issues.
test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this build
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 redesign is complete and visually matches the 3 reference NBFC sites the user provided. All 15 routes return 200 with zero console errors. Verified items: (1) Header — dark blue top strip + white brand row + 5 NavLink primary nav (orange active state) + orange 'Apply Now' button + working mobile menu toggle at <1024px. (2) Home — hero blue gradient + headline + 4 orange-check bullets + Apply Now/Learn More + hero image with '100% DIGITAL' & '24 Hrs QUICK DISBURSAL' overlay badges; 4-stat row (1500+/₹40Cr+/10+ Cities/99% Satisfaction); 'Simple Process' steps grid (Apply Online/Verify Documents/Sign Digitally/Get Disbursal); 'Our Loan Products' 4-card grid (Pay Day/Business/Loan Against Property/EMI Loan); About split; Why Choose 6-card grid (Swift Approvals/Transparent Pricing/RBI Compliant/Minimal Paperwork/High Acceptance/Customer First); dark CTA band with Apply Online + Speak with Expert — both buttons clearly visible (white-outline Speak with Expert has white text + white border on linear-gradient(135deg, #0f2855 → #133e8a) background). (3) Policy pages — blue hero + breadcrumb + 10-item sidebar with active in cream bg rgb(255,244,232) + orange text rgb(245,130,32). (4) Fonts — body Open Sans, h1 Poppins, both confirmed via getComputedStyle. (5) Contact form — submit disabled before consent, enabled after consent. (6) ScrollToTop confirmed on route change. (7) .ph placeholder = subtle cream bg rgb(255,247,233), matches 'subtle, not loud' spec. (8) Real verbatim policy content intact on Interest Rate (Master Direction 2025, rate table 0.10/1.00/8/25/12/15/24/365, 1.25%, 3 days free look, NACH, prepayment-strictly-not-permitted), Privacy (age of 13, cookies, info@logixfinance, 879624245), FPC, Grievance (48 hours / 7 / 15 working days / 879624245). Minor wording deltas vs iteration-2 noted: 'Part Prepayment' vs 'Part pre-payment'; 'Rs. 500' vs 'Rs.500'. data-testid coverage: site-header, site-footer, top-contact, top-grievance, brand-logo-link, primary-nav, nav-* (5), header-apply-btn, mobile-menu-toggle, mobile-menu, mobile-nav-* (5), mobile-apply-btn, footer-* (5 quick links), footer-policy-* (10). No console errors, no page errors anywhere.
rca of the issue: N/A — no critical issues found this iteration. Only minor wording deltas in Interest Rate Policy text and the literal '&' in the support email are flagged for the main agent's review.
